user.title: Create a Normified sensor
user.description: Choose the source. Normify inherits unit, device class, state class, and icon whenever the source provides them.

data_description.name: Leave blank to derive the name from the source.
data_description.attribute: Leave blank to condition the source state.
data_description.hide_source: Cannot be used when conditioning an attribute.

conditioning.title: Condition the value
conditioning.description: Clamp the physical range, optionally calibrate, and select at most one smoothing method.

data_description.minimum: Values below this boundary are clamped to it.
data_description.maximum: Values above this boundary are clamped to it.
data_description.data_points_text: Optional raw, corrected pairs, one per line.
data_description.window: Used by median and moving-average smoothing.

publication.title: Control publication
publication.description: Round values, suppress insignificant changes, limit update frequency, and detect stale sources.

data_description.maximum_interval: Zero disables forced publication of a held value.
data_description.stale_after: Zero retains the last valid value indefinitely.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure source
reconfigure.description: Update the source and optional name override.

reconfigure_conditioning.title: Reconfigure conditioning
reconfigure_conditioning.description: Update clamping, calibration, and the single smoothing method.

reconfigure_publication.title: Reconfigure publication
reconfigure_publication.description: Update precision, deadband, throttling, heartbeat, and staleness.

abort.already_configured: This Normify helper is already configured.
abort.invalid_import: The YAML conditioning configuration is invalid.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The Normify helper was reconfigured successfully.
